notes: Core layout contracts include blocks, rows, columns, boxes, scrolling, and viewport composition.
Text and structure family now includes labels, paragraphs, headings, and semantic text primitives.
Inputs and controls family covers forms, editable text widgets, and selection controls.
Navigation family covers routed transitions, screen and stack navigation, and tab state.
Data and virtualization family includes tables, trees, virtual lists, and list/value-style content views.
Visualization family covers gauges, charts, sparklines, raster output, and image/timeline rendering.
Rich content family covers markdown, code, syntax, diff, ANSI, and rich text widgets.
Runtime and services family covers notifications, progress rendering, and runtime service surfaces.
Toolkit family covers retained trees, element rendering, functional component state and effects, reusable modifiers, pilot tooling, and stylesheet integration.
Testing and semantics family covers pilot semantics, semantic snapshots, and query-driven assertions.
